esg_policy.value: Palantir’s ESG policy commits to responsible business and sustainability, including human rights, privacy, anti‑modern‑slavery, and ethical AI, as well as environmental actions such as greenhouse‑gas accounting across Scopes 1‑3, annual energy‑use assessments, and purchasing renewable power to achieve carbon neutrality.
